prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mastery VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for elemental mastery beams, shells, and impact feedback.
Subject: twelve compact VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire beam, ice beam, earth beam, heal beam, armor shell, gold sparkle beam, hit impact, heal impact, shield pulse, coin burst, mastery charge ring, small trail particle.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 4x3 layout, each effect centered with padding, no clipping.
Color palette: elemental colors with white highlights and gold accents, but no magenta inside any sprite.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadow touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no frame; no panel; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any sprite content.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
